description: Happy path: compare a real CTR value against YouTube home-decor-diy benchmarks
prohibit: gap_assessment is unknown when alex_value is provided and benchmark_range is non-null
benchmark_range values fabricated rather than read from benchmarks.json
recommendation containing a specific numeric target presented as guaranteed

description: Minimal input: no alex_value provided; gap_assessment must be unknown
prohibit: alex_value is a non-null number when none was supplied
gap_assessment is above, below, or within when alex_value is null
fabricated creator metric inserted to fill the gap
recommendation containing specific action when gap_assessment is unknown

description: Edge case: unsupported niche not in benchmarks.json; benchmark_range must be null with gap flag

expect.interpretation: non-empty string mentioning the niche is not available in benchmarks

prohibit: benchmark_range containing fabricated low/high values for an unsupported niche
gap_assessment is above, below, or within when benchmark_range is null
borrowing or extrapolating from adjacent niches to fill the range
